artPrompt: A gaunt evangelist pressing thin blank pamphlets into reluctant hands on a smoky midnight street, ashen robes and hollow imploring eyes, cold gold halos of candlelight smearing through drifting ash, the looming clock tower a hazy blood-dark silhouette behind, the dread of inevitable news rendered with tender solemn light, rendered as soft pastel impressionism — hazy diffuse light, visible chalky texture, gentle gradients, dreamy muted color.
name: Pamphlet of the Inevitable
text: You draw two cards and you lose 2 life. Then you may distribute the pamphlet: each opponent loses 1 life. Knowledge of the end is free; ignorance is not an option.
flavorText: Fourteen pages. Thirteen of them are the same sentence.
